title: Manifest-Based Admission Control — Upgrade and downgrade
text:
Upgrade
: Enabling the feature and providing manifest configuration is
opt-in. Existing clusters without manifest configuration see no behavioral
change.
Downgrade
: Before downgrading to a version without this feature:
Remove
staticManifestsDir
entries from the
AdmissionConfiguration
file.
If relying on manifest-based policies, recreate them as API objects where
possible.
Restart the kube-apiserver.
